title: [HWMemSimImp] Use for loop in the write stage

features.name: variable_part_select_indexed_memory_write
features.description: Code should include a memory write using indexed part-select pattern with base offset and variable width in an always block
features.snippet: always @(posedge clk) if (en & wmask[0]) Memory[addr][32'h0 +: 8] <= wdata[7:0];

features.name: byte_enable_write_mask_logic
features.description: Code should include a write mask check combined with enable and write mode signals for conditional memory writes

features.name: for_loop_memory_byte_write
features.description: Code should include a for loop inside an always block to perform byte-wise memory writes with indexed part selects
features.snippet: always @(posedge clk) begin for (int i = 0; i < 8; i++) if (en & wmask[i]) Memory[addr][8*i +: 8] <= wdata[8*i+:8]; end
